name: Pear and Cranberry Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Peel and slice the pears.
3. Grease a 9-inch baking pan.
4. Combine corn syrup, sugar, and cornstarch in a saucepan.
5. Stir in cranberries and heat until boiling.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes, until cranberries pop open.
7. Stir in the pears.
8. Pour mixture into the prepared pan.
9. In a separate bowl, combine flour and sugar.
10. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
11. Stir in oats; mix well.
12. Add beaten egg, mixing until moistened.
13. Crumble mixture evenly over fruit.
14. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
